TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: nu Ai-ji a micidekay a kungku kakiliman nu Ai-ji a micidekay a kungku malasumamadan a Ai-ji nu micidekay a kungku. namakay i kulit tu sakatineng tu nu kakawusan kay yadah, nu sumamadan a Ai-ji a tademaw sakatinengan tu kapah tu nu sakatinengan i kitakit, u micidekay a kungku mahida u sumamadan a kyukay nu Ai-ji u sakahenulan kyuni. Ai-j micidekay a kungku i sumamadan a Ai-ji nasulitan atu nalimaan hina tahekal, nanu linga tu katukuh i sumamadan a Ai-ji tu apuyu'ay a kungku, nu kyukay a lisin micukaymas tu bangcalay a sulit nu dadiw, sulit nu sapibaung, kuni pisulit nu mapatayay atu u sasalisinay a tuud maadih amin I Ai-ji nu micidekay a kungku nu adingu. nika kina kungku hina liwaliwasak, nayay ku malucekay a micidekay a kungku tu nu nipisulit, u nu duma aca ku yadahay nu micidekay a kungku i dumadumaan. nilacul nitatengan sakay i kitakit Ma-a-te "Ma-a-te" (Amuhuwan a kamu:maat/ma'at, nu Ai-ji a kamu: m3ňĀt) i sumamadan a Ai-ji u milihayay tu i kitakit a misakasasilac. Ma-a-te misabaluhay a kitakit tu sayaway atu liwliway nu nika sasipudan. ci Ma-a-te malaaadingan nu tademaw ku wayway nida, misasengi tu hekalay a kitakit nu nika sasumasumadan malineng, uyni u Ay-jiay a tademaw salipahakay ku nikaudip. sakay i tini i kakawusan anu lacusay atu kapahay mamikuan tu kitakit, u kakawusan a wayway nu Ay-ci a micidakay a kungku malasakaudip nu kitakit tu nikalalineng. sakay i Ay-ci a tademaw sa, i sakaudip miading tu "Ma-a-te" ku hungt nu Ay-ci atu Falaw. i caay kalecaday a micidekay a kungku, u hungti nu caayay kalecad a kakawusan nu wawa, sisa Falaw nu kasumamadan a Ay-ci a tademaw i hekal nu sakaudipay mikutayay a tademaw, ba'ket ku abala mikuwan tu sakaudip, kyu palatademaw tu sakakapah nika udipan atu nu kyukayay a lisin. u wayway nu kitakit i labu nu Ai-ji a micidekay a kungku, hekal nu kitakit u maibukay a nanum,"nanu u mahidaay a nunum", mahida u kakawusan "Nu-en". mahida u lalad nu mapipiay, ya wayway mahida u lalad nu kakawusan ci "Kay-pu", matabu tu hekal, mahida a wayway u takupuwan nu kakawusan ci "Nu-te". takupuwan atu lalad nu hanhan a kakawusan nu malaliyasay. mahida u tademawan nu cilal a kakawusan ci "La" i demiad micaliway tu takupuwan, mulakuwit tu udip ni "Nu-te", ya likad papelid tu hekalay, nu kitakit manengil tu.nu labiay a kakawusan ci "La" miawas tu enal micumud tu di'tuan, i dikudan nu makasasa, idaw ku cacayay a "nanu mahidaay a nunum" malaliten tu micidekay a kenis, malaliyun tu ku tademaw nu makasasa atu makapabaway. i sananal, ci "La" mulakuwit tu di'tuan a kakawusan pasawali tu ti-ping-sian misapaluhay tu waliay. nitatengan tu tuki nitatengan tu patay sapadihing a cudad nadikudan nika patay masaybang tu satangahan a micidakay a kungku u sayaway a micidekay a kungku u sayaway a micidekay a kungku nu He-li-aw-pu-li-si u sayaway a micidekay a kungku nu He-er-mu-pu-li-si u sayaway a micidekay a kungku nu Meng-fei-si u sayaway a micidekay a kungku nu Ti-pi-si
S.PHON: nu ai-ji a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku kakir~…ĺiman nu ai-ji a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku mar~…ĺasumamadan a ai-ji nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku. namakaj i kur~…ĺit tu sakatin…ôŇč tu nu kakawusan kaj jadańß, nu sumamadan a ai-ji a tad…ômaw sakatin…ôŇčan tu kapańß tu nu sakatin…ôŇčan i kitakit, u mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku mańßida u sumamadan a kjukaj nu ai-ji u sakańß…ônur~…ĺan kjuni. ai-j mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku i sumamadan a ai-ji nasur~…ĺitan atu nar~…ĺimaan ńßina tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, nanu r~…ĺiŇča tu katukuńß i sumamadan a ai-ji tu apuju Ē~ °aj a kuŇčku, nu kjukaj a r~…ĺisin mi ¶ukajmas tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a sur~…ĺit nu dadiw, sur~…ĺit nu sapibauŇč, kuni pisur~…ĺit nu mapatajaj atu u sasar~…ĺisinaj a tuud maadińß amin i ai-ji nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu adiŇču. nika kina kuŇčku ńßina r~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwasak, najaj ku mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku tu nu nipisur~…ĺit, u nu duma a ¶a ku jadańßaj nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku i dumadumaan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nitat…ôŇčan sakaj i kitakit ma-a-t…ô "ma-a-t…ô" (amuńßuwan a kamu:maat/ma Ē~ °at, nu ai-ji a kamu: m**t) i sumamadan a ai-ji u mir~…ĺińßajaj tu i kitakit a misakasasir~…ĺa ¶. ma-a-t…ô misabar~…ĺuńßaj a kitakit tu sajawaj atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj nu nika sasipudan. ¶i ma-a-t…ô mar~…ĺaaadiŇčan nu tad…ômaw ku wajwaj nida, misas…ôŇči tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kitakit nu nika sasumasumadan mar~…ĺin…ôŇč, ujni u aj-jiaj a tad…ômaw sar~…ĺipańßakaj ku nikaudip. sakaj i tini i kakawusan anu r~…ĺa ¶usaj atu kapańßaj mamikuan tu kitakit, u kakawusan a wajwaj nu aj- ¶i a mi ¶idakaj a kuŇčku mar~…ĺasakaudip nu kitakit tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺin…ôŇč. sakaj i aj- ¶i a tad…ômaw sa, i sakaudip miadiŇč tu "ma-a-t…ô" ku ńßuŇčt nu aj- ¶i atu far~…ĺaw. i ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku, u ńßuŇčti nu ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a kakawusan nu wawa, sisa far~…ĺaw nu kasumamadan a aj- ¶i a tad…ômaw i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sakaudipaj mikutajaj a tad…ômaw, ba Ē~ °k…ôt ku abar~…ĺa mikuwan tu sakaudip, kju par~…ĺatad…ômaw tu sakakapańß nika udipan atu nu kjukajaj a r~…ĺisin. u wajwaj nu kitakit i r~…ĺabu nu ai-ji a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kitakit u maibukaj a nanum,"nanu u mańßidaaj a nunum", mańßida u kakawusan "nu-…ôn". mańßida u r~…ĺar~…ĺad nu mapipiaj, ja wajwaj mańßida u r~…ĺar~…ĺad nu kakawusan ¶i "kaj-pu", matabu tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, mańßida a wajwaj u takupuwan nu kakawusan ¶i "nu-t…ô". takupuwan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺad nu ńßanńßan a kakawusan nu mar~…ĺar~…ĺijasaj. mańßida u tad…ômawan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ a kakawusan ¶i "r~…ĺa" i d…ômiad mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu takupuwan, mur~…ĺakuwit tu udip ni "nu-t…ô", ja r~…ĺikad pap…ôr~…ĺid tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj, nu kitakit man…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu.nu r~…ĺabiaj a kakawusan ¶i "r~…ĺa" miawas tu …ônar~…ĺ mi ¶umud tu di Ē~ °tuan, i dikudan nu makasasa, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a "nanu mańßidaaj a nunum" mar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ôn tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a k…ônis, mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu ku tad…ômaw nu makasasa atu makapabawaj. i sananar~…ĺ, ¶i "r~…ĺa" mur~…ĺakuwit tu di Ē~ °tuan a kakawusan pasawar~…ĺi tu ti-piŇč-sian misapar~…ĺuńßaj tu war~…ĺiaj. nitat…ôŇčan tu tuki nitat…ôŇčan tu pataj sapadińßiŇč a ¶udad nadikudan nika pataj masajbaŇč tu sataŇčańßan a mi ¶idakaj a kuŇčku u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu ńß…ô-r~…ĺi-aw-pu-r~…ĺi-si u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu ńß…ô-…ôr-mu-pu-r~…ĺi-si u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu m…ôŇč-f…ôi-si u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu ti-pi-si
S.FORM: nu Ai-ji a micidekay a kungku kakiliman nu Ai-ji a micidekay a kungku malasumamadan a Ai-ji nu micidekay a kungku. namakay i kulit tu sakatineng tu nu kakawusan kay yadah, nu sumamadan a Ai-ji a tademaw sakatinengan tu kapah tu nu sakatinengan i kitakit, u micidekay a kungku mahida u sumamadan a kyukay nu Ai-ji u sakahenulan kyuni. Ai-j micidekay a kungku i sumamadan a Ai-ji nasulitan atu nalimaan hina tahekal, nanu linga tu katukuh i sumamadan a Ai-ji tu apuyu'ay a kungku, nu kyukay a lisin micukaymas tu bangcalay a sulit nu dadiw, sulit nu sapibaung, kuni pisulit nu mapatayay atu u sasalisinay a tuud maadih amin I Ai-ji nu micidekay a kungku nu adingu. nika kina kungku hina liwaliwasak, nayay ku malucekay a micidekay a kungku tu nu nipisulit, u nu duma aca ku yadahay nu micidekay a kungku i dumadumaan. nilacul nitatengan sakay i kitakit Ma-a-te "Ma-a-te" (Amuhuwan a kamu:maat/ma'at, nu Ai-ji a kamu: m3ňĀt) i sumamadan a Ai-ji u milihayay tu i kitakit a misakasasilac. Ma-a-te misabaluhay a kitakit tu sayaway atu liwliway nu nika sasipudan. ci Ma-a-te malaaadingan nu tademaw ku wayway nida, misasengi tu hekalay a kitakit nu nika sasumasumadan malineng, uyni u Ay-jiay a tademaw salipahakay ku nikaudip. sakay i tini i kakawusan anu lacusay atu kapahay mamikuan tu kitakit, u kakawusan a wayway nu Ay-ci a micidakay a kungku malasakaudip nu kitakit tu nikalalineng. sakay i Ay-ci a tademaw sa, i sakaudip miading tu "Ma-a-te" ku hungt nu Ay-ci atu Falaw. i caay kalecaday a micidekay a kungku, u hungti nu caayay kalecad a kakawusan nu wawa, sisa Falaw nu kasumamadan a Ay-ci a tademaw i hekal nu sakaudipay mikutayay a tademaw, ba'ket ku abala mikuwan tu sakaudip, kyu palatademaw tu sakakapah nika udipan atu nu kyukayay a lisin. u wayway nu kitakit i labu nu Ai-ji a micidekay a kungku, hekal nu kitakit u maibukay a nanum,"nanu u mahidaay a nunum", mahida u kakawusan "Nu-en". mahida u lalad nu mapipiay, ya wayway mahida u lalad nu kakawusan ci "Kay-pu", matabu tu hekal, mahida a wayway u takupuwan nu kakawusan ci "Nu-te". takupuwan atu lalad nu hanhan a kakawusan nu malaliyasay. mahida u tademawan nu cilal a kakawusan ci "La" i demiad micaliway tu takupuwan, mulakuwit tu udip ni "Nu-te", ya likad papelid tu hekalay, nu kitakit manengil tu.nu labiay a kakawusan ci "La" miawas tu enal micumud tu di'tuan, i dikudan nu makasasa, idaw ku cacayay a "nanu mahidaay a nunum" malaliten tu micidekay a kenis, malaliyun tu ku tademaw nu makasasa atu makapabaway. i sananal, ci "La" mulakuwit tu di'tuan a kakawusan pasawali tu ti-ping-sian misapaluhay tu waliay. nitatengan tu tuki nitatengan tu patay sapadihing a cudad nadikudan nika patay masaybang tu satangahan a micidakay a kungku u sayaway a micidekay a kungku u sayaway a micidekay a kungku nu He-li-aw-pu-li-si u sayaway a micidekay a kungku nu He-er-mu-pu-li-si u sayaway a micidekay a kungku nu Meng-fei-si u sayaway a micidekay a kungku nu Ti-pi-si
S.PHON: nu ai-ji a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku kakir~…ĺiman nu ai-ji a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku mar~…ĺasumamadan a ai-ji nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku. namakaj i kur~…ĺit tu sakatin…ôŇč tu nu kakawusan kaj jadańß, nu sumamadan a ai-ji a tad…ômaw sakatin…ôŇčan tu kapańß tu nu sakatin…ôŇčan i kitakit, u mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku mańßida u sumamadan a kjukaj nu ai-ji u sakańß…ônur~…ĺan kjuni. ai-j mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku i sumamadan a ai-ji nasur~…ĺitan atu nar~…ĺimaan ńßina tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, nanu r~…ĺiŇča tu katukuńß i sumamadan a ai-ji tu apuju Ē~ °aj a kuŇčku, nu kjukaj a r~…ĺisin mi ¶ukajmas tu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a sur~…ĺit nu dadiw, sur~…ĺit nu sapibauŇč, kuni pisur~…ĺit nu mapatajaj atu u sasar~…ĺisinaj a tuud maadińß amin i ai-ji nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu adiŇču. nika kina kuŇčku ńßina r~…ĺiwar~…ĺiwasak, najaj ku mar~…ĺu ¶…ôkaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku tu nu nipisur~…ĺit, u nu duma a ¶a ku jadańßaj nu mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku i dumadumaan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ nitat…ôŇčan sakaj i kitakit ma-a-t…ô "ma-a-t…ô" (amuńßuwan a kamu:maat/ma Ē~ °at, nu ai-ji a kamu: m**t) i sumamadan a ai-ji u mir~…ĺińßajaj tu i kitakit a misakasasir~…ĺa ¶. ma-a-t…ô misabar~…ĺuńßaj a kitakit tu sajawaj atu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiwaj nu nika sasipudan. ¶i ma-a-t…ô mar~…ĺaaadiŇčan nu tad…ômaw ku wajwaj nida, misas…ôŇči tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kitakit nu nika sasumasumadan mar~…ĺin…ôŇč, ujni u aj-jiaj a tad…ômaw sar~…ĺipańßakaj ku nikaudip. sakaj i tini i kakawusan anu r~…ĺa ¶usaj atu kapańßaj mamikuan tu kitakit, u kakawusan a wajwaj nu aj- ¶i a mi ¶idakaj a kuŇčku mar~…ĺasakaudip nu kitakit tu nikar~…ĺar~…ĺin…ôŇč. sakaj i aj- ¶i a tad…ômaw sa, i sakaudip miadiŇč tu "ma-a-t…ô" ku ńßuŇčt nu aj- ¶i atu far~…ĺaw. i ¶aaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku, u ńßuŇčti nu ¶aajaj kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad a kakawusan nu wawa, sisa far~…ĺaw nu kasumamadan a aj- ¶i a tad…ômaw i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sakaudipaj mikutajaj a tad…ômaw, ba Ē~ °k…ôt ku abar~…ĺa mikuwan tu sakaudip, kju par~…ĺatad…ômaw tu sakakapańß nika udipan atu nu kjukajaj a r~…ĺisin. u wajwaj nu kitakit i r~…ĺabu nu ai-ji a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku, ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu kitakit u maibukaj a nanum,"nanu u mańßidaaj a nunum", mańßida u kakawusan "nu-…ôn". mańßida u r~…ĺar~…ĺad nu mapipiaj, ja wajwaj mańßida u r~…ĺar~…ĺad nu kakawusan ¶i "kaj-pu", matabu tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, mańßida a wajwaj u takupuwan nu kakawusan ¶i "nu-t…ô". takupuwan atu r~…ĺar~…ĺad nu ńßanńßan a kakawusan nu mar~…ĺar~…ĺijasaj. mańßida u tad…ômawan nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ a kakawusan ¶i "r~…ĺa" i d…ômiad mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu takupuwan, mur~…ĺakuwit tu udip ni "nu-t…ô", ja r~…ĺikad pap…ôr~…ĺid tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj, nu kitakit man…ôŇčir~…ĺ tu.nu r~…ĺabiaj a kakawusan ¶i "r~…ĺa" miawas tu …ônar~…ĺ mi ¶umud tu di Ē~ °tuan, i dikudan nu makasasa, idaw ku ¶a ¶ajaj a "nanu mańßidaaj a nunum" mar~…ĺar~…ĺit…ôn tu mi ¶id…ôkaj a k…ônis, mar~…ĺar~…ĺijun tu ku tad…ômaw nu makasasa atu makapabawaj. i sananar~…ĺ, ¶i "r~…ĺa" mur~…ĺakuwit tu di Ē~ °tuan a kakawusan pasawar~…ĺi tu ti-piŇč-sian misapar~…ĺuńßaj tu war~…ĺiaj. nitat…ôŇčan tu tuki nitat…ôŇčan tu pataj sapadińßiŇč a ¶udad nadikudan nika pataj masajbaŇč tu sataŇčańßan a mi ¶idakaj a kuŇčku u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu ńß…ô-r~…ĺi-aw-pu-r~…ĺi-si u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu ńß…ô-…ôr-mu-pu-r~…ĺi-si u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu m…ôŇč-f…ôi-si u sajawaj a mi ¶id…ôkaj a kuŇčku nu ti-pi-si
